case_title: CASELLI, DENNIS A. VS PETERS, JOEL INDIVIDUALLY et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-22-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-05-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUANCE IS BECAUSE OF UNTIMELY SERVICE OF PROCESS.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,900.00 FILED BY CASELLI, DENNIS A. AS TO DEFENDANT PETERS, JOEL INDIVIDUALLY J. R. PETERS CO., INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-22-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASELLI, DENNIS A. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PETERS, JOEL INDIVIDUALLY J. R. PETERS CO., INC. THE PRESIDENT OF J.R. PETERS CO INC. (JOEL PETERS) WAS PRESENT AND STIPULATED TO THE AMENDMENT OF THE COMPLAINT TO ADD J.R. PETERS CO. INC. AS AN ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT. SERVICE OF PROCESS ON J.R. PETERS CO. INC. WAS WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PETERS, JOEL INDIVIDUALLY
